case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. CHASE TRANSPORT LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100213990) AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE TRANSPORT LLC
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100206522) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100213454), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. SERVED AUG-22-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE TRANSPORT LLC
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 585 (D) AND ASSIGNMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100225057) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100206522) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE TRANSPORT LLC DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-16-2024
DECLARATION OF ERIC J. JUN RE METHOD OF CALCULATING INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 100225057) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHASE TRANSPORT LLC $11,348.64 PRINCIPAL, $1,475.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,325.44 INTEREST, $681.76 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,830.84, SEE SCANNED DOC
